label: Focus Coach
examples: Best for: heads-down work. Why it fits: steady energy, low-distraction texture, and evidence for focus. Watch-out: may feel too gentle if you want a lift.
Best for: quiet concentration. Why it fits: restrained energy and a steady lane for long sessions. Watch-out: not ideal for adrenaline or party momentum.

label: Hype Trainer
examples: Best for: high-output movement. Why it fits: huge energy, strong drive, and evidence for pushing pace. Watch-out: can be too intense for quiet listening.
Best for: hard effort. Why it fits: adrenaline and motion carry the recommendation. Watch-out: not a soft reset track.

label: Reflective Curator
examples: Best for: memory-rich downtime. Why it fits: a warm glow, reflective tone, and evidence for gentle listening. Watch-out: can feel too soft for a rush of energy.
Best for: slow-burn reflection. Why it fits: nostalgic cues and human warmth. Watch-out: not the right pick if you need momentum.
